case_title: ANGIE K DEFABIO VS. REDWOOD RANCH STABLES, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,650.00 FILED BY DEFABIO, ANGIE K AS TO DEFENDANT REDWOOD RANCH STABLES, INC. JEFFERY, DAVID D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-05-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED JUL-24-1400, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REDWOOD RANCH STABLES, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEFABIO, ANGIE K AS TO DEFENDANT REDWOOD RANCH STABLES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT REDWOOD RANCH STABLES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-30-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANTS AGREE TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1,450.00 IN FOUR INSTALLMENTS ON OCTOBER 15, NOVEMBER 15 AND DECEMBER 15, 2014 AND JANUARY 15, 2015, PAYABLE BY CHECK IN THE MAIL. IF DEFENDANTS FAIL TO MAKE A PAYMENT AS AGREED, PLAINTIFF MAY ASK THE COURT FOR A JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF THE UNPAID BALANCE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DAVID D. JEFFERY--CO-OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEFABIO, ANGIE K AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFERY, DAVID D
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED) SERVED JUL-23-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REDWOOD RANCH STABLES, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 9/5/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
